positive: A central, elegant composition featuring a group of stylized forest animals (deer, fox, rabbit) gathered under a crescent moon and intricate constellations. The style is harmonious neo-tribal line art mixed with deep watercolor washes, emphasizing a monochromatic palette of deep indigo, earthy sepia, and muted teal. The silhouette design must be crisp and highly contrasted against a clean background, suitable for repeat or singular print on clothing. Use clean, graphic line work that suggests myth and nature's mystery. Highly detailed, whimsical, gothic fantasy, vector art style, high contrast, clean negative space, centered composition, ethereal glow.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, cropped, noise, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, disfigured, extra limbs, cartoon, realistic photo, messy, gradient background, logo, text, branding
